metadata_mapping.performers: Not reliably published on scene pages; omit instead of guessing
metadata_mapping.tags: VideoObject.genre plus keyword list, excluding the author/channel name

performers: No scene-specific performer list found during live validation in May 2026
search_results: Search pages render scene cards as article blocks with /video/ links and h2 titles
performer: Performer avatar from img alt='{name} avatar'

search_strategy.notes: Parse scene cards from the rendered search/category page. Each result exposes a /video/{slug} URL and h2 title.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: Use site search plus fuzzy title similarity. Accept the top match only when it is exact or above a reasonable similarity threshold.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: During live validation on 2026-05-11, curl with a browser-like User-Agent succeeded consistently while requests-based fetches often returned 502 Bad Gateway.
No login or captcha was required for scene or performer pages tested.
known_limitations: Scene performer names are not emitted because no reliable scene-specific performer list was identified on tested scene pages.
Performer profile pages appear sparse and may only expose name, description, and avatar.
Search can return category-like results for broad terms and broad matches for short fragments.
The scraper depends on a system curl binary being available on the Stash host.
